**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

UCwave RF Technology (Jiangsu) Co., Ltd. exemplifies the trend of advanced electronics manufacturing relocating from Tier-1 cities to specialized industrial parks. Originally registered in Qingpu District, Shanghai (USCC 91310118) as 'Youchuang RF Technology (Shanghai)', the company successfully migrated its manufacturing base to Liandong U Valley in the Nantong Economic and Technological Development Area (Jiangsu Province). Unlike pure R&D shells, this entity has a robust 19M RMB paid-in capital and 116 insured employees, confirming it as an active, scaled production facility. The corporate email domain '@ucwave.com.cn' identifies its commercial brand as UCwave. Its core focus is on the production of high-frequency RF coaxial cables, components, and cutting-edge Terahertz (THz) detection technologies, serving the telecommunications and aerospace sectors.

Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 70)
